title: Add Horizontal Scroll Portfolio Section
description: Create a horizontally scrollable portfolio section with snap points.
hints: display: flex; overflow-x: auto; scroll-snap-type: x mandatory
solution: Use flexbox with overflow-x: auto. Set scroll-snap-type: x mandatory on container, scroll-snap-align: start on items.

title: Build a Full-Page Preloader Animation
description: Add a creative preloader animation that plays before the page content appears.
solution: Create a fixed overlay div. Animate logo/text with CSS keyframes. After animation (or page load), fade out the overlay with opacity transition.

title: Create an Interactive Team Member Modal
description: Build a modal system for team members with bio, social links, and photo.
requirements: Click team avatar to open modal
Bio, role, social links inside modal
solution: Each team member has a data attribute. On click, open a centered dialog with the member's info. Trap focus with querySelectorAll focusable elements.
